name: Cabbage Patch Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven over Medium heat, cook the ground beef, onion, and garlic. Stir to break up the meat.
2. Cook until browned. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Add cabbage, carrots, bay leaf, and thyme. Cook, covered, stirring often for 12 minutes.
4. Stir in water, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 10-12 minutes until all vegetables are tender.
6. Stir in chopped parsley. Remove the bay leaf.
7. If desired, stir in instant potato flakes to thicken the stew.
